title: Polychron Feedback Topology
description: A machine-readable map of the closed loops, firewalls, and emergence boundaries governing the polychron composition engine.

CONDUCTOR_BLINDNESS.description: Cross-layer coordination affects local probability but cannot inject signals directly into the conductor. Conductor is insulated from structural micro-adjustments.

SIGNAL_DELAY.description: Cross-layer queries the conductor via conductorSignalBridge, introducing a mandatory, one-beat delayed snapshot requirement.

REGISTRY_DAMPENING.description: All closed-loop feedback mechanisms must enroll through feedbackRegistry and pipelineCouplingManager to prevent resonant feedback cascades.

feedbackLoops.mechanism: Compares absolute note yield against target density. Feeds a PID-like corrective multiplier into conductor density calculations.
Adapts the structural phase into a target entropy value to maintain varying predictability levels across a composition arc.
Rewards structural modules if their recommended adaptations yield musically stable density and cohesion. Punishes destabilizing signals with weight decay.
Detects high Pearson correlation between density, tension, and flicker pipelines; nudges outputs via adaptive gain to maintain multidimensional variance.
Senses continuous sustained high-tension streaks and triggers an advisory for the conductor pipeline to initiate a relaxation arc.
